positive: A minimalist, stylized forest scene illustration. The composition features a central grove of towering, whimsical trees with exaggerated, curved silhouettes, set against a gradient background of pastel sky and deep forest emerald. The style is modern, flat vector illustration meets bioluminescence glow. Details include glowing motes of light drifting between the trunks, a meandering river rendered with clean, solid shapes, and stylized, non-representational flora (mushrooms, ferns) placed in the foreground. Use strong contrast between the dark, saturated forest greens and the bright, glowing ethereal light sources. Ideal for T-shirt print placement, maintaining clean edges and solid color blocks. UHD, high contrast, clean lines, vector art quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, bad anatomy, watermark, text, logo, signature, jpeg artifacts, noisy, messy, cluttered, copyrighted, characters
